title: Description of Premises
text: The Licensor/Landlord hereby licenses or leases to the Licensee/Tenant the premises situated at {{property_address}} ("Premises"), together with all fixtures, fittings, and facilities forming part thereof. The Premises shall be used solely for {{permitted_use}} and for no other purpose without the prior written consent of the Licensor/Landlord. The Licensee/Tenant has inspected the Premises and is satisfied with its condition. The Licensor/Landlord warrants that it has full right and authority to license or lease the Premises and that the Premises are free from encumbrances that would materially affect the Licensee/Tenant's peaceful enjoyment.
name: Description of Premises

legal_basis.note: Definition of lease — premises must be identifiable

dispute_hotspots: Vague property description — disputes about what is included (parking, storage, terrace)
Incorrect survey number or extent — affects registration and enforceability
Fixtures and fittings — what was included in the letting
